validation.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
validation.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.

device_status.tooltip: Last registration activity the server observed. RustDesk Server free does not expose real-time per-peer presence.

empty_states.devices: No devices yet. Share an invite link to onboard the first one.
empty_states.users: Just you here. Add users with the «New user» button.
empty_states.invites: No active invites. Create one so a new client can connect.
empty_states.tokens: No Personal Access Tokens. Create one with «New token» for scripts or integrations.
empty_states.logs: No events for these filters. Try expanding the range or clearing filters.
empty_states.address_book: Empty address book. Peers are added when you connect with a RustDesk client.
empty_states.tags: No tags. Create them to group devices (e.g. «Home», «Workshop»).
empty_states.devices_filtered: No devices match the active filters.
